ddls:
CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the athlete */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the athlete */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the athlete */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the athlete */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the athlete */,
  "team_discipline" TEXT /* Skiing discipline the athlete specializes in */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the athlete */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the athlete in meters */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the athlete in kilograms */,
  "home_resort" TEXT /* Home resort of the athlete */,
  "equipment_sponsor" TEXT /* Equipment sponsor of the athlete */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the athlete's coach */,
  "training_location" TEXT /* Location where the athlete trains */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., North American Cup) */,
  "discipline" TEXT /* Skiing discipline of the event */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season in which the event takes place */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the event */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the event is held */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the venue */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the venue is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the venue is located */,
  "event_director" TEXT /* Name of the event director */,
  "event_manager" TEXT /* Name of the event manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the race is part of */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race */,
  "race_date" TEXT /* Date when the race takes place */,
  "discipline" TEXT /* Skiing discipline of the race */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the race is held */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the race (e.g., completed, scheduled) */,
  "race_director" TEXT /* Name of the race director */,
  "chief_of_race" TEXT /* Name of the chief of race */,
  "course_setting" TEXT /* Course setting for the race */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_races_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race the result is for */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete who achieved the result */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Ranking of the athlete in the race */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points the athlete earned in the race */,
  "metrics" TEXT /* Metrics or statistics related to the athlete's performance */,
  "top_3_counter" INTEGER /* Counter indicating if the athlete was in the top 3 */,
  "bib_number" INTEGER /* Bib number assigned to the athlete */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the athlete */,
  "finish_time" TEXT /* Finish time of the athlete */,
  "penalties" INTEGER /* Penalties incurred by the athlete */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the venue */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the venue */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the venue */,
  "fax_number" TEXT /* Fax number of the venue */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the venue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipments" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of equipment */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the equipment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the equipment (e.g., available, in use) */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue where the equipment is located */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the equipment */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the equipment */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the equipment was manufactured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipments_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staffs" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "staff_name" TEXT /* Name of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member in the event */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the staff member */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue where the staff member works */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the staff member */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the staff member */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Certifications held by the staff member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staffs_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the schedule is for */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race the schedule is for */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the race */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the race */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the schedule */,
  "schedule_type" TEXT /* Type of schedule (e.g., race, training, press conference) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registration */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete who registered */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the athlete registered for */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the athlete registered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the registration (e.g., confirmed, pending) */,
  "entry_fee" TEXT /* Entry fee for the event */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used by the athlete */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_manager" TEXT /* Name of the team manager */,
  "team_coach" TEXT /* Name of the team coach */,
  "team_sponsor" TEXT /* Name of the team sponsor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "athlete_teams" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the athlete joined the team */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the athlete left the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id", "team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each official */,
  "official_name" TEXT /* Name of the official */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the official in the event */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the official */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the official */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Certifications held by the official */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_official_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "official_id" INTEGER /* ID of the official */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the official was assigned to the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id")
)
